title: Version 19.0b1 text select color doesn't show up in message compose window
creator: vrajarajagovinda
content:
When I select text in message compose window, the text select colour remains white, same as the background colour. I'm using dark theme in message composer just to avoid this problem.

Miui - android 10 I think an update to Thunderbird broke this. Else it was working perfectly.
